title: Home Builder Service Turtle — Wire Format Schemas v1
description: Canonical wire formats emitted by the Home Builder Agent for the Patton AI iOS Shell to deserialize without transformation. Covers: the six view-model payloads (master/daily/weekly/monthly/checklist-gates/notification-feed), the engine_activity audit log row, and the six SSE event types streamed by /v1/turtles/home-builder/ask/stream (discriminated by the `type` field). See docs/specs/canonical-data-model.md, docs/specs/migration_003_review.md, and patton-ai-ios docs/03_build/turtle_contract_v1.md.

DropDeadDatePayload.description: A computed drop-dead order date for a material category on a project.
DropDeadDatePayload.title: DropDeadDatePayload

MasterPhasePayload.description: Phase + drop-dead dates aligned to it (master view only).

id.description: Stable phase id within a project
id.title: Id

MasterPhasePayload.title: MasterPhasePayload

MilestonePayload.description: Date-anchored event with no duration. Mirrors canonical-data-model.md § entity 4.
MilestonePayload.title: MilestonePayload

PhaseStatus.description: Phase lifecycle states. Stateful entity → hyphenated where multi-word.
PhaseStatus.title: PhaseStatus

MasterView.description:
Full project Gantt-equivalent timeline + drop-dead overlay.

canonical-data-model.md § Master schedule.

drop_dead_dates.description: Full drop-dead list; also embedded per-phase above for renderer convenience
drop_dead_dates.title: Drop Dead Dates

MasterView.title: MasterViewPayload

DailyItemPayload.description:
One activity item in the daily view. Discriminator: `kind`.

Specific shape varies by kind. Common fields below; per-kind fields are
optional at the schema level so renderers branch on `kind`.
DailyItemPayload.title: DailyItemPayload

DailyProjectPayload.description: Per-project group within the daily view.
DailyProjectPayload.title: DailyProjectPayload

pct_complete_vs_plan.description: Earned-time style — phases complete weighted by duration
pct_complete_vs_plan.title: Pct Complete Vs Plan

PhaseStatus.description: Phase lifecycle states. Stateful entity → hyphenated where multi-word.
PhaseStatus.title: PhaseStatus

category.description: One of 10 for Precon (Client & Contract, Plans & Engineering, ...); smaller set for other phases
category.title: Category

items_by_category.description: Items grouped by category for renderer convenience
items_by_category.title: Items By Category

NotificationItemPayload.description: One Event surfaced as a Notification. Mirrors entity 13 wrapping entity 17.

type.description: selection-deadline | weather-delay | material-no-show | sub-no-show | inspection-failure | schedule-slip | extensible
type.title: Type

NotificationItemPayload.title: NotificationItemPayload

ActivityOutcome.description: Terminal outcome of an action dispatched by hb-router.
ActivityOutcome.title: ActivityOutcome

ActivitySurface.description: Where a Claude-autonomous action originated. Mirrors the SQL CHECK.
ActivitySurface.title: ActivitySurface

HBEngineActivity.description:
One row from home_builder.engine_activity as it surfaces to iOS.

Wire format for the Activity tab. Each row represents one autonomous
Claude action through hb-router. Lookup by actor_user_id (recent-first)
is the default; per-project filtering is via the project_id field.

actor_user_id.description: auth.users id of who triggered this. Null for background actions.
actor_user_id.title: Actor User Id

project_id.description: Project UUID this action affects. Null for cross-project actions.
project_id.title: Project Id

invoked_agent.description: Which underlying agent ran (e.g. 'hb-receipt'). Null when classified as 'unknown' (no dispatch).
invoked_agent.title: Invoked Agent

user_intent.description: Chad's original NL input — what shows as the row's primary line.
user_intent.title: User Intent

parameters.description: Structured params extracted by the router.
parameters.title: Parameters

result_summary.description: Human-readable summary for the row's secondary line. Empty allowed; iOS renders no-summary case as gray italic.
result_summary.title: Result Summary

affected_entity_id.description: UUID of the affected entity. Tap to navigate to its detail screen.
affected_entity_id.title: Affected Entity Id

cost_usd.description: Anthropic API cost for this single activity.
cost_usd.title: Cost Usd

error_message.description: If outcome=error or partial, what failed (plain text, not stack trace).
error_message.title: Error Message

created_at.description: When the activity row was inserted.
created_at.title: Created At

HBEngineActivity.title: HBEngineActivityPayload

HBAskCitationAddedEvent.description: A Drive file was opened (read_drive_file). Render as a citation chip immediately.

name.description: Drive file display name (e.g. 'Tracker – Whitfield Residence').
name.title: Name

webViewLink.description: Direct Drive URL the chip opens on tap.
webViewLink.title: Webviewlink

HBAskCitationAddedEvent.title: HBAskCitationAddedEvent

HBAskErrorEvent.description: Terminal event. Stream encountered an error before completing.

error_type.description: Pythonic exception class name or domain-specific code (e.g. 'AuthenticationError', 'MaxIterationsReached', 'stream_expired').
error_type.title: Error Type

HBAskErrorEvent.title: HBAskErrorEvent

HBAskMessageCompleteEvent.description: Terminal event. Full final answer + citations + cost + duration.

citations.description: All citations from this answer. Same shape as citation_added events.
citations.title: Citations

tools_called.title: Tools Called

HBAskMessageCompleteEvent.title: HBAskMessageCompleteEvent

HBAskTextDeltaEvent.description: A token batch from Claude as it composes the answer.

delta.title: Delta

HBAskTextDeltaEvent.title: HBAskTextDeltaEvent

HBAskToolResultEvent.description: Tool returned. Surface as a status update; full result feeds Claude's next turn server-side.

id.description: Matches the corresponding tool_use event's id.
id.title: Id

HBAskToolResultEvent.title: HBAskToolResultEvent

HBAskToolUseEvent.description: Claude invoked a tool. Surface as a 'thinking…' indicator with the tool name.

id.description: Anthropic tool_use block id; pairs this event with the matching tool_result.
id.title: Id

HBAskToolUseEvent.title: HBAskToolUseEvent

HBAskStreamEnvelope.description:
Full SSE event as it's surfaced to clients — id + type discriminator + payload.

The engine emits (event_id, event_type, payload) tuples. The route handler
serializes them into SSE wire format (id: ..., event: ..., data: {...}).
iOS reconstructs an envelope per emitted event by combining the SSE id +
event lines with the data payload. Pinning the envelope as a Pydantic model
so iOS Codable matches what's actually on the wire.

event_id.description: Monotonic per-stream ID. Matches SSE 'id:' line.
event_id.title: Event Id

HBAskStreamEnvelope.title: HBAskStreamEventEnvelope

HBAskTextDelta.description: A token batch from Claude as it composes the answer.

delta.description: Token text to append to the active answer bubble.
delta.title: Delta

HBAskTextDelta.title: HBAskTextDeltaEvent

HBAskToolUse.description: Claude invoked a tool. Surface as a 'thinking…' indicator with the tool name.

id.description: Anthropic tool_use block id; pairs this event with the matching tool_result.
id.title: Id

HBAskToolUse.title: HBAskToolUseEvent

HBAskToolResult.description: Tool returned. Surface as a status update; full result feeds Claude's next turn server-side.

id.description: Matches the corresponding tool_use event's id.
id.title: Id

HBAskToolResult.title: HBAskToolResultEvent

ActivitySurface.description: Where a Claude-autonomous action originated. Mirrors the SQL CHECK.

UserSignalType.description:
v1 vocabulary of in-app behavior signals.

Open-enum at the DB layer per migration 004 decision 3, but pinned
here so engine + iOS + profile-builder agree on the names. Adding
a new type = update this enum + iOS Codable + the profile-builder's
aggregator. No DB migration required.
UserSignalType.title: UserSignalType

HBUserSignal.description:
One in-app behavior signal as it surfaces on the wire.

POST /v1/signals accepts an array of these from iOS (batched per
decision Q-A in migration 004 review). Schema mirrors the SQL columns
in home_builder.user_signal.

The `payload` dict is polymorphic — see signal vocabulary table in
migration_004_review.md for the per-type shape contract. Pydantic
keeps this loose at the wire layer; profile-builder dispatches on
`signal_type` to a typed payload model when reading.

actor_user_id.description: auth.users id of who emitted this signal
actor_user_id.title: Actor User Id

surface.description: Surface that emitted the signal — mirrors engine_activity.surface

payload.description: Signal-specific structured data; shape varies by signal_type
payload.title: Payload

project_id.description: Optional project context — null for app-wide signals like screen_view of project picker
project_id.title: Project Id

session_id.description: Optional foreground-session UUID; iOS generates per session_start, omitted for background-emitted
session_id.title: Session Id

client_timestamp.description: When the iOS device recorded the event (different from server-received `created_at`)
client_timestamp.title: Client Timestamp

created_at.description: When the signal row was inserted server-side
created_at.title: Created At

HBUserSignal.title: HBUserSignalPayload

preferred_terms.description: Phrases Chad uses naturally that Claude should mirror
preferred_terms.title: Preferred Terms

avoid.description: Phrases / formality levels Chad doesn't respond to
avoid.title: Avoid

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. 'America/Chicago'). Notification dispatcher consults this.
timezone.title: Timezone

HBUserProfileV1.description:
Current preference state JSONB stored at user_profile.profile (version=1).

Read by every Claude-touching surface (hb-ask, hb-router, push
notification dispatcher) via system-prompt injection. Built nightly
by hb-profile from user_signal + engine_activity + Drive/Gmail
activity.

attention_weights.description: project_id → 0..1 weight indicating relative attention. Used by hb-router to disambiguate 'the project' references.
attention_weights.title: Attention Weights

ignored_alert_types.description: Notification template types Chad consistently dismisses; dispatcher suppresses these.
ignored_alert_types.title: Ignored Alert Types

voice_input_pct.description: Fraction of recent inputs that used voice — telemetry, not behavioral.
voice_input_pct.title: Voice Input Pct

HBUserProfileV1.title: HBUserProfileV1
